name: NFR 5 – Delete User Account (Soft Delete / Deactivation)
description: Verify that the soft-delete endpoint PATCH /api/v1/users/{user_id} meets performance requirements when 50 concurrent users send deactivation requests.
preconditions: Test users must exist and be in 'active' status.
Authorization is required (valid token must be provided for each request).
Users must not have pending transactions that prevent deletion.

metrics.target_value: Deactivated users must not appear in GET /users/active

notes: Post-test verification required: deactivated users must not appear in GET /users/active. Authorization header required for every request.
